query:
-- Update WealthBridge AZ with gold/navy color scheme
UPDATE organization_landing_page_config 
SET primaryColor = '#D4AF37', accentColor = '#F5E6B8',
    headline = 'WealthBridge Arizona', 
    subtitle = 'Your trusted financial partner in the Grand Canyon State',
    ctaText = 'Get Started',
    trustSignal1 = 'Arizona Licensed', trustSignal2 = 'FINRA Compliant', trustSignal3 = 'Fiduciary Standard'
WHERE organizationId = 1;

-- Update WealthBridge with navy/white color scheme  
UPDATE organization_landing_page_config 
SET primaryColor = '#1B2A4A', accentColor = '#0EA5E9',
    headline = 'WealthBridge', 
    subtitle = 'Intelligent financial guidance for every stage of life',
    ctaText = 'Get Started',
    trustSignal1 = 'SEC Registered', trustSignal2 = 'FINRA Compliant', trustSignal3 = 'Bank-Level Security'
WHERE organizationId = 2;
